center.name: John Kirk Townsend
center.summary: John Kirk Townsend是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括沃氏雨燕、Chestnut-backed chickadee，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-backed chickadee (Poecile rufescens) is a small passerine bird in the tit family, native to western North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vaux's swift (Chaetura vauxi) is a small swift native to North America, Central America, and northern South America
